title: File your GST/HST return - Canada.ca
content:
## File your GST/HST return
Find out how to file your return, no matter what your situation is.
Contact us about filing your GST/HST return
- Online – get account information, send documents, and share feedback
- By phone – get answers specific to your file
- By mail – mail a document to the right address
Hi! I am the Canada Revenue Agency's GenAI chatbot. Select the icon or press Ctrl+Shift+H to start a chat.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
